directive_events.owner_directive: Create one private GitHub repo per package under jiazhenz026 (imaging, lcms, spectroscopy, srs); move each package out with git subtree split preserving history; this session creates and pushes the repos. Package-repo CI/tests are out of scope for this PR.
directive_events.reason: Owner concretized live directives for #1770 decoupling session (Claude live_implementer)

directive_events.owner_directive: Completely delete the SCISTUDIO_DEV monorepo fallback from core (blocks/types/previewer registries, io _unified_dispatch, api runtime, mcp runtime, gate checks SCISTUDIO_DEV setter, include_monorepo param chains). Core discovers plugins only via entry points. Keep srs->imaging dependency declaration intact.

Create an in-repo fake test-fixture package mirroring real-package structure but with zero functional implementation; re-wire core-machinery tests from real packages onto the fake package; move plugin-behavior coverage tests out with their packages. A dedicated agent implements the fake package and test migration.
Decoupling implemented: monorepo fallback deleted, packages/ removed, fake fixture package added, core-machinery tests rewired, plugin-behavior tests removed (now in standalone repos).

owner_directive: Decouple domain block packages from SciStudio core: move package-owned source/tests out of core, keep only extension/runtime package contracts, and prepare standalone package repository split.
